stemHtml: On which latitudes can the coriolis force in practice be neglected for meteorological purposes?

options.a: From about 10 to about 30 degrees north and south.
options.b: From about 30 to about 75 degrees north and south.
options.c: From 0 to about 10 degrees north and south.
options.d: From about 75 to 90 degrees north and south.
